layer_label_zh: 晶圓測試 · 先進 AI 晶片

price_target.kill_condition: If AI test handler utilization falls < 80% for two consecutive quarters → exit. AI chips need 3–5× test time of legacy; loss of utilization breaks the margin thesis.

A_ai_exposure.note: AI test revenue % rising — confirm latest disclosure

B_order_visibility.note: Capex announcements with named customers are the proof

C_growth_potential.note: Test time per AI chip 3–5× legacy → revenue per wafer 3–5× even at flat unit volumes

E_increasing_moat.note: Handler capacity for advanced AI chips is concentrated — KYEC/Sigurd are the two scaled options in Taiwan

F_revaluation.note: Margin structural step-up is the primary 重估 lever

customers_named: [PENDING — confirm exposure to NVDA / AMD / Broadcom AI silicon via TSMC]

receipts.summary_en: [PENDING — AI test handler capex with named application]
receipts.summary_zh: [PENDING — AI 測試機台資本支出公告]

receipts.summary_en: [PENDING — most recent 法說會 quote on AI test mix + utilization + Q+N visibility]
receipts.summary_zh: [PENDING — 最新法說會: AI 測試比重 + 稼動率 + 訂單能見度]

receipts.summary_en: [PENDING — Teradyne/Advantest equipment shipment data to Taiwan testers]

order_visibility.kill: Two consecutive quarters of softer 「AI 測試稼動率」 language → exit. Margin compression > 200 bps without volume offset → cut half.

mechanism.en: [PENDING ≥600 words: AI accelerator → multi-die package → exhaustive test (burn-in, system-level, multi-pattern) → 3–5× test time vs legacy → revenue per wafer multiplier. Quantify per-NVDA-GB200 test hours and KYEC share.]

moat_widening.en: [PENDING: Advanced AI test handlers are scarce; 2.5D/3D packages need specialized fixturing. KYEC + Sigurd are the two scaled Taiwan options. Quantify share gain trajectory.]

revaluation_thesis.en: [PENDING: Market prices KYEC as a smartphone-cycle test house. AI test mix lifting GM/OM into a structurally higher band → multiple re-rating once 2 quarters of margin step-up confirm.]

kill_condition.en: AI accelerator design wins shifting to OSAT in-house test (TSMC, ASE expanding test) — disintermediation risk. Watch ASE earnings calls for test capex.

if_kill_then.en: Exit. No good defensive position in test if disintermediation prints — move to substrate (3037) or interconnect.
